name: Crabmeat Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Spread the mixture onto the English muffins and cut each into four pieces.
3. Freeze the assembled muffins on a baking sheet, then transfer to a plastic bag.
4. Use as needed. To reheat, bake frozen at 400°F for 10-12 minutes.
